_comment: Canonical unified gitnexus configuration (Tier 2bis.4). Drop this at the root of a repo as `.gitnexus.json`. Replaces the legacy `.gitnexus-domains.json` (Tier 2.2) and `.gitnexus-policy.json` (Tier 2.5) — each section is optional, declare only what you need. Backward-compatibility: the legacy files keep working with a deprecation warning to stderr; if both unified + legacy are present, unified wins.

domains._comment: Consumed by /dissonance (Tier 2.2). Maps domain names to file-path globs (** = any subpath, * = any segment). First-match-wins, so order from most-specific to least-specific.

policy._comment: Consumed by /similarity (Tier 2.5). When `isolation_required: true`, the 'Jumeaux' quadrants are rewritten to 'Jumeaux (isolation intentionnelle)' and the merge recommendation is suppressed. `allow_merge_with` whitelists explicit exceptions.

budgets._comment: Reserved for Tier 3.6 (Architectural CI). When that ships, /ci-check will block PRs that push metrics past these caps. Safe to omit until then.

watches._comment: Reserved for Tier 2bis.3 (alerting). When that ships, the watch loop fires the webhook when the threshold is crossed. Safe to omit until then.
